nasb.text: The Lord is righteous within her; He will do no injustice. Every morning He brings His justice to light; He does not fail. But the unjust knows no shame.

esv.text: The Lord within her is righteous; he does no injustice; every morning he shows forth his justice; each dawn he does not fail; but the unjust knows no shame.

cnv.text: 耶和華在城中是公義的， 決不行不義的事； 他每日早晨都顯明公正， 永不止息。 不公義的人卻不知廉恥。

ccb.text: 但城中的耶和华是公义的， 祂绝不做不义之事。 祂每天早晨伸张正义，从不间断。 然而，不义之人却不知羞耻。
